import react from "react"; import {Link,Routes, Route, Navigate, BrowserRouter} from 'react-router-dom'; const EditAdmin = () =>{ return <>
Curtain Gifts < Link to = "/addGIft" className="link"> Gift < Link to = "/addTheme" className="link"> Themes < Link to = "/orders" className="link"> Orders < Link to = "/login" className="link">Logout
















Edit Gifts


















} export default EditAdmin
